## [Project Unique Identifier, eg: `praveenscience/SSoC26-Projects`]

- Full GitHub URL: 
- Full Name of PA: 
- Full LinkedIn URL of PA: 
- Project Mentors (if no one, remove this section):
  - Mentor 1 Name: 
  - Mentor 1 LinkedIn: 

Make sure the description is between 120 to 150 characters for uniformity for all the projects.

Make sure the JSON is 2 spaces aligned, if not, PR will not be merged.

Your Project JSON (get it from [the portal](https://portal.socialsummerofcode.com/create-project)) - incase we have to deal with Merge Conflict and stuff:

<!-- below is an example, use yours -->

```json
{
  "owner": "darshan2456",
  "repo": "C_DSA_interactive_suite",
  "projectName": "C_DSA_interactive_suite",
  "description": "An interactive terminal-based DSA library written in pure C for learners who want to understand data structures at the memory level, built with manual memory management, a Makefile build system, CI pipeline, and Valgrind-verified memory safety. Implements Dijkstra's algorithm, iterative BFS and DFS, merge sort, quicksort, binary search tree, and hashing with separate chaining and linear probing among many more",
  "techStack": [
    "C",
    "Make",
    "GDB",
    "Valgrind",
    "Linux"
  ],
  "adminName": "Darshan Mukul Parekh",
  "linkedIn": "https://www.linkedin.com/in/darshan-parekh-777699351",
 
}
```
